auto_applied.new_value: 9,629 worldwide (Coupe + Cab; Porsche Newsroom); ~4,130 North America

sources.name: Porsche Newsroom — 911 Turbo S History press kit
sources.quote: By the time of the model facelift, Porsche had produced 9,629 examples.
sources.scope: Turbo S only (Coupe + Cab combined), 991.1 generation only (2013–2016)

auto_applied.adjudication: 9,629 is the exact figure from Porsche's own Newsroom press kit. The prior ~12,900 figure most likely represents Turbo (non-S) + Turbo S combined. Community consensus places the Turbo-to-Turbo S ratio at approximately 1:2; if Turbo S = 9,629 then Turbo ≈ 3,200–4,800, putting the combined figure in the 12,800–14,400 range consistent with ~12,900.
auto_applied.note_on_na_figure: ~4,130 North America figure is retained as-is pending verification — no primary source found. Flagged in staging.json as MEDIUM item for review.
